title: Monday.com Harvest Time Tracking Button (Freebie!)
excerpt:
Hey Mondayers! 
If you’re like me, you wish that Monday.com had a Harvest time tracking button in the interface so you could click and start tracking time with Harvest. Today is your lucky day! I have a little freebie pl…

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mondayers!

If you’re like me, you wish that Monday.com had a Harvest time tracking button in the interface so you could click and start tracking time with Harvest. Today is your lucky day! I have a little freebie plugin for you that does this.

This uses the Custom Javascript chrome extension (linked in install guide below) and some custom code to insert the Harvest button into the monday UI.

See how to install here:

GitHub

GitHub - jkushner/monday-com-harvest-integration: Custom JS to add Harvest...

Custom JS to add Harvest time tracking buttons to Monday.com - GitHub - jkushner/monday-com-harvest-integration: Custom JS to add Harvest time tracking buttons to Monday.com

If you feel like adding more functionality, feel free to mod, fork etc.
Happy time tracking!
-Jake

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @jk193 – this is awesome, thanks for sharing.

posts.author: stacic (Staci Cretu)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone tried this? It’s not working for me.

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @stacic I just took a look and can confirm it’s still working for me (which means it should be for all monday users!) Feel free to DM me by going to my profile and hitting the blue Message button monday Community Forum - A community for monday.com users

I can help but will need a screenshot of the “CJS” chrome plugin window

posts.author: cwert (Caitlin Burkhead)
posts.cookedHtml: Super cool - thanks for sharing!

posts.author: jeffhogg11 (Jeff Hogg)
posts.cookedHtml: @jk193 I would love to install this, but the link to install the chrome extension is 404ing. Is this still active and working?

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry for not seeing this until now. It seems to have moved to here Custom JavaScript for Websites 2 - Chrome Web Store

posts.author: KS1990 (Kayla)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi does this still work. I tried to set this up but a orange square just appears.

posts.author: HannahKnight (Hannah Knight)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jk193 I have the sane issue as Kayla above. Tried this but get an orange box unfortunately! Would love to see if this could work for us.
Thanks

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you share a screenshot of the problem?

posts.author: HannahKnight (Hannah Knight)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jake K:

jkushner/monday-com-harvest-integration

Hi Jake, thank you for coming back! I had to reset the plugin a few tomes but it’s working for me now. This is a super little addition! Thank you very much for sharing this with the community.

posts.author: Molly194 (Molly Penn)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi this is what I want but I don’t know how to embed JS into Monday.

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml: See the installation guide linked at top. You need to use the custom js chrome extension as described in the github link.

posts.author: Molly194 (Molly Penn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the guide. There is still something I don’t understand - your instructions say:

  1. Slide the toggle to enable in top right. Then click the “your own external scrips” link and paste in the following into the external scripts window: //platform.harvestapp.com/assets/platform.js;
  2. In the main plugin window where it says paste your code here, paste in the custom javascript code.
  3. In the code you just pasted, look for YOUR-SUBDOMAIN-HERE and replace it with your monday.com account subdomain. Then press Save in the CJS extension window.
  4. Then refresh and when you open a task, you’ll see the little orange timer button in the top right of the sidebar.

Step number 3 here (it renumbered your steps when I pasted it here) says "in the code you just pasted look for YOUR-SUBDOMAIN-HERE but the code I just pasted is //platform.harvestapp.com/assets/platform.js; - there is nothing there with my subdomain. ???

posts.author: Molly194 (Molly Penn)
posts.cookedHtml: OK I figured that out - but it’s still not working.

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Go to chrome://extensions/
Make sure the custom js extension you installed is enabled (toggle is blue)
Click Details on its card
Look for “Site access” and make sure its on specific sites, and paste in the first part of your monday account URL e.g. https://YourCompany.monday.com/

posts.author: Molly194 (Molly Penn)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry, still not working. Do I need to integrate Harvest with every board in Monday to see it?

posts.author: Molly194 (Molly Penn)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not seeing it even in the one board I have integrated with Harvest. It’s supposed to appear when I open an item on the right side panel, right?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: exclude_reply_from_sla

I went through the steps to re-install but no luck, after comoleting all the steps I’m still not seeing the button.
